song_name: Ed Sheeran - Shivers - Jennifer Lopez - Waiting For Tonight
version_description: Mash Up Between Ed Sheeran's Shivers and J-Lo's Waiting for Tonight (Capo can be adjusted as needed to sing comfortably).
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Capo 5

[Intro]
| [ch]Am[/ch]     | [ch]F[/ch]      | [ch]C[/ch]      | [ch]G[/ch]      |


[Verse 1]
[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
I took an arrow to the heart[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]F[/ch]
I never kissed a mouth that tastes like yours[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Strawberries and then something more[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Ooh yeah, I want it all[/tab]

Lipstick on my guitar, ooh[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]F[/ch]
Fill up the engine, we can drive real far[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]
Go dancing underneath the stars[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Ooh yeah, I want it all, mm, you got me feeling like[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
 I wanna be that guy, I wanna kiss your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
 I wanna drink that smile, I wanna feel like I[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                           [ch]G[/ch]
 Like my souls on fire, I wanna stay up all day and all night[/tab]
      N.C.
Yeah, you got me singing like

It's perfect, it's passion, it's setting me free[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
From all of my sadness[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
The tears that I've cried[/tab]
